platform.requiredActionsTitle: Required from the platform account now
platform.requiredActionsDesc: Specific operating commands instead of browsing every fund manually.
platform.activeSupportSessionsDesc: Every session must stay within its reason, scope, and time.
platform.unscopedSupportSession: Support scope not opened by name
platform.entityReviewsDesc: This is not a list of every fund; only cases that need a decision.

platform.legacyTableHint: This table is no longer the starting point. Use it after the surface identifies what needs your intervention.
platform.suspendHint: A clear reason (at least 5 characters) is required and saved to the audit log.
platform.activateConfirmBody: Do you want to activate {name} again? Members will be allowed access immediately upon activation.
